contentPattern.structure: icon + title + optional platform-logo row + description + optional client-logo row + up to two CTA buttons

suitableFor: detailed service / capability sections with icon, heading, description and CTAs
media-rich repeating offerings that include platform/client logo strips
stacked full-width service blocks separated by rules
notSuitableFor: simple icon+title+description feature grids without logos or buttons (use cards-services)
